# True-positive secret samples — must be detected by .claude/hooks/secret-scan.sh
# Full tokens for Slack/GitHub/etc. are intentionally NOT written here to avoid
# triggering GitHub Push Protection on this repo; those are constructed at runtime
# in tests/hooks/test-secret-patterns.sh instead.

AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
password = "hardcoded-value-do-not-use"
CH_PASSWORD = "supersecretpassword"
